deckDescription: Useful words for offices and paperwork
level: Ich habe morgen einen Termin im Buergeramt.
example: I have an appointment at the citizens office tomorrow.

deckDescription: Useful words for offices and paperwork
example: Wir ziehen im Sommer nach Berlin um.
exampleTranslation: We are moving to Berlin in the summer.
note: Separable verb with sein in the perfect tense.

deckDescription: Useful adjectives for conversations and everyday judgments
example: Das ist fuer mich sehr wichtig.

note: Helpful with comparison and preposition practice.
